donate.title: Xhasa i-AISBF
donate.thank_you: Siyabonga ngokuqonda ukupha. Ukuxhaswa kwakho kusiza ukugcina i-AISBF njenge-software evulekile simahla.

welcome.title: Wamukelekile ku-AISBF!
welcome.early_adopter: Siyabonga ngokuba umsebenzisi wokuqala! Sikhona esigabeni sokuthuthukiswa okukhulu.
welcome.feedback: Impendulo yakho isixhasa ukuthuthukisa i-AISBF. Ungamanqabi ukuxhumana nathi!

contact.title: Xhumana nathi
contact.question: Umbuzo
contact.message_placeholder: Chaza inkinga noma isicelo sakho ngokuningiliziwe...
contact.success: Umyalezo uthunywe ngempumelelo! Siyabonga ngempendulo yakho.

providers.credentials_file_desc: Indlela lapho iziqu ze-OAuth2 zizogcinwa khona
providers.upload_credentials_desc: Layisha ifayela JSON leziqu ze-Claude OAuth2
providers.provider_key_hint: Lokhu kuzosetshenziswa njengomchongi womhlinzeki kunkulungiselelo kanye nemibuko yokuthola ye-API
providers.kiro_auth_hint: Khetha indlela eyodwa yokuziqinisekiswa: Imimiselo ye-Kiro IDE (creds_file), ikhophi lekhophi ye-kiro-cli (sqlite_db) noma imimiselo eya ngqo (refresh_token + client_id/secret).
providers.kiro_sqlite_hint: Indlela yesixhumanisi sekhophi lekhophi ye-kiro-cli ye-SQLite
providers.kiro_refresh_hint: Ithokeni yokuqala kabusha kwe-Kiro yokuziqinisekiswa ngqo
providers.kiro_client_id_hint: Ukubonakalisa umkhwebi we-OAuth2 ngomthetho we-AWS SSO OIDC
providers.kiro_client_secret_hint: Isimanga somkhwebi we-OAuth2 ngomthetho we-AWS SSO OIDC
providers.kiro_upload_creds_hint: Layisha ifayela le-JSON yemimiselo ye-Kiro IDE
providers.kiro_upload_sqlite_hint: Layisha ifayela lekhophi lekhophi ye-SQLite ye-kiro-cli
providers.kilo_auth_hint: Khetha indlela yokuziqinisekiswa ozothandayo: Ukhiye we-API (kulondoloziwe ngoba kulula) noma ukuqinisekiswa kwesixhobo se-OAuth2.
providers.subscription_based_hint: Uma kuthiwa, le ngxenye yokuthola inguqulelwe yibhaliso futhi izindlela zingabhaliswa njengama-$0. Ukusetshenziswa kuzothunyelwa njengoba kunezimo zokuphatha.
providers.price_prompt_hint: Shiya linye uma udinga ukusebenzisa inani elijwayelekile. Izibonelo: i-OpenAI GPT-4: $10, i-Anthropic Claude: $15, i-Google Gemini: $1.25
providers.price_completion_hint: Shiya linye uma udinga ukusebenzisa inani elijwayelekile. Izibonelo: i-OpenAI GPT-4: $30, i-Anthropic Claude: $75, i-Google Gemini: $5.00
providers.rate_limit_hint: Isikhathi esinye phakathi kwezicelo kule ngxenye yokuthola
providers.default_rate_limit_tpm_hint: Umolimo wesivumelwano womthombo ngenhloso kumimela kule ngxenye yokuthola
providers.default_rate_limit_tph_hint: Umolimo wesivumelwano wehora ngemithombo kumimela kule ngxenye yokuthola
providers.default_rate_limit_tpd_hint: Umolimo wesivumelwano wesuku ngemithombo kumimela kule ngxenye yokuthola
providers.default_condense_method: Indlela yokunciphisa esizenzakalelayo (ingxoxo, semantiki, ihayerekali, i-algorithmic)
providers.native_caching_hint: Amakhono okulondoloza okusuka kuhlinzeki (Anthropic cache_control, Google Context Caching, OpenAI kanye nama-API amakhompathetha ne-kilo) ukwehlisa izindlela
providers.enable_native_caching_hint: Nika amandla ukulondoloza okusuka kuhlinzeki ukwehlisa izindlela (ukusinda kuka-50-70% kumabahlinzeki abekwe)
providers.cache_ttl_hint: Ubomi besikhala sokulondoloza (ngezizindi) (kusebenzisa i-Google Context Caking kuphela)
providers.min_cacheable_tokens_hint: Inani elincane lemathokana elinokulondolozwa kugcineke njengokuthi lokhu kumele kubukeke (okwenzeka: 1000)
providers.prompt_cache_key_hint: Ukhiye wolondolozo olukhethwe kusebenzisa ukuqondisana kokuthunyelwa kwezinsiza ze-OpenAI/Kilo
providers.models_section_hint: Lungiselela imimela ethize kule ngxenye yokuthola, noma shiya linye ukuze ithole ngokuzenzekela zonke imimela ezikhona kuma-API omhlinzeki.
providers.model_filter_hint: Uma akukho mimela elulungiselelwe ngokubhalisa, imimela eyodwa kuphela ezingenayo leli khethu lizotholakala (ngokuvumela amanani okukhulu nokuncane, isibonisi esimisayo)

rotations.notify_errors_desc: buyisela amaphutha njengemiyalezo uma bonke abahlinzeki behluleka
rotations.leave_empty: Shiya amamodeli engenalutho ukusebenzisa wonke avela kumhlinzeki
rotations.copy_prompt: Kopisha "{key}" — faka ukhiya okusha kokususa okubuyela emuva:
rotations.add_prompt: Faka ukhiya kokususa okubuyela emuva (isibonelo: "ukwenza ngokwekhodi", "okujwayelekile"):
rotations.key_different: Ukhiya okusha kufanele kube ngokohlukile komthombo

autoselect.default_settings_desc: Amanani ajwayelekile emamodelini kulokhu ukukhetha ngokwalo
autoselect.default_condense_context_desc: Qalisa ukunciphisa umongo kuleli nani lama-token
autoselect.model_description_hint: Yiba nzulu ngokuthi le modeli isetshenziswa nini
autoselect.copy_prompt: Kopisha i-"{key}" — faka ukhiye omusha we-autoselect:

rate_limits.no_data: Awekho omikhawulo wesivinini asebenzayo. Idatha izovela uma abahlinzeki bethola izimpendulo ze-429.

wallet_page.title: Wallet
wallet_page.no_card: Auto top-up charges your saved credit card automatically. You don't have a credit card on file yet.
wallet_page.auto_topup_desc: Enable auto top-up to automatically reload your wallet when the balance drops below a threshold.
wallet_page.no_payment_methods: No payment methods are currently enabled.
wallet_page.contact_admin: Please contact the administrator to enable a payment gateway.
wallet_page.wallet_upgrade_hint: You can use your wallet balance to subscribe to a paid plan and unlock higher limits.
wallet_page.invalid_amount: Sicela ukhethe noma ufake inani eliphakathi kuka-{min} no-{max}.

rate_limits_page.title: Rate Limits
rate_limits_page.desc: Adaptive rate limiting — learns from 429 responses
rate_limits_page.reset_all_confirm: Setha kabusha bonke abakhawuli besivinini? Lokhu kuzocisha yonke imikhawulo efundiwe.
rate_limits_page.reset_all_success: Bonke abakhawuli besivinini basethwe kabusha ngempumelelo

signup_page.title: Yenza iakhawunti
signup_page.username_hint: 3-50 characters, letters, numbers, underscores, hyphens, and dots only
signup_page.email_hint: You will receive a verification email at this address
signup_page.password_hint: At least 8 characters with uppercase, lowercase, and numbers

forgot_page.title: Setha kabusha iphasiwedi
forgot_page.intro: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgot_page.sent: If an account exists with that email address, we have sent a password reset link. The link will expire in 24 hours. Please check your inbox and spam folder.

reset_page.title: Iphasiwedi entsha
reset_page.intro: Please enter your new password below.
reset_page.password_hint: Must be at least 8 characters long
reset_page.success: Your password has been successfully reset. You can now login with your new password.
reset_page.invalid_token: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new password reset link.

profile_page.title: Hlela iphrofayili
profile_page.subtitle: Buyekeza ulwazi lweakhawunti
profile_page.display_name_hint: This is how your name will be displayed throughout the application
profile_page.upload_hint: Max 5 MB. JPG, PNG, GIF, WebP.
profile_page.danger_zone_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
profile_page.upload_too_large: Image is too large. Maximum size is 5 MB.
profile_page.upload_invalid_type: Invalid file type. Please upload JPG, PNG, GIF or WebP.

email_page.title: Change Email Address
email_page.subtitle: Update your email address. You will need to verify the new email before it takes effect.

delete_page.title: Delete Account
delete_page.warning: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
delete_page.danger_zone_desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data.
delete_page.item_providers: Bonke abahlinzeki bakho be-API nokulungiselela kwabo
delete_page.sub_warning_desc: You have an active paid subscription ({tier}). Deleting your account will:
delete_page.sub_item_access: Uzolahlekelwa ukufinyelela kuzo zonke izici ze-premium
delete_page.sub_item_refund: Akukho mbuyiselo ezokhishwa ngesikhathi sokubhalisa esisele
delete_page.sub_consider: Cabanga ukukhansela ukubhalisa kwakho kuqala uma ufuna ukuqhubeka ukusisebenzisa kuze kuphele isikhathi sokukhokha.
delete_page.type_delete_confirm: Sicela uthayiphe "DELETE" ngokunembile ukuze uqinisekise ukusulwa kwe-akhawunti.
delete_page.final_confirm: Uqinisekile ngokuphelele? Lesi senzo asikwazi ukuhlehliswa futhi yonke idatha yakho izosulwa unomphela.

tokens_page.title: API Tokens
tokens_page.desc: Generate tokens to authenticate requests to your personal API endpoints.
tokens_page.no_tokens_hint: Create one to start using the API.
tokens_page.copy_now_warn: این توکن را همین حالا کپی کنید — دوباره نمایش داده نخواهد شد.
tokens_page.auth_header_desc: توکن را در هدر {header} به هر درخواست اضافه کنید:
tokens_page.scope_both_access: هر دو نقطه پایانی API و MCP
tokens_page.ep_chat: چت با استفاده از پیکربندی‌های شما
tokens_page.delete_confirm: این توکن API را حذف می‌کند؟ این کار قابل برگشت نیست.

billing_page.title: Billing
billing_page.wallet_desc: Zonke izitifiketi zokuhliswa nezimali zikhishwa ngokuzenzekela kuqala kwesiqulathi sakho.
billing_page.no_payment_methods_desc: Ngicela uxhumise umqondisi ukuze unike amandla umbukelo wezimali.

user_overview.subtitle: Manage your AI configurations, track usage, and access your personal API endpoints.
user_overview.higher_plans: {n} imigomo ephezulu itholakala — izicelo eziningi, abahlinzeki abaningi
user_overview.auth_header_desc: Faka ithokhani le-API yakho kwi-{header} phezulu:
user_overview.admin_access_desc: Njengomqondisi, unokufinyelela ngokusebenzisa imifomethi yemodeli emfushane konfigurashoni yezizwe:
user_overview.token_required: Kudingeka ithokhani le-API yakho zonke iziphumo zakho.

usage_page.title: Usage & Quotas
usage_page.no_token_cap: No token cap on this plan
usage_page.upgrade_desc: Vula amaphrothokhula, abahlinzeki nokukhetha ngokuzenzekela ngokukhuthaza indlela yakho

prompts_page.title: Iziqondiso zesistimu
prompts_page.content_hint: Edit the prompt template. Use markdown formatting as needed.
prompts_page.reset_confirm: Are you sure you want to reset this prompt to the default admin configuration?

tiers_page.title: Ukuphathwa kwezinga lwe-akhawunti
tiers_page.subtitle: Configure account tiers, pricing, and usage limits for your users

subscription_page.title: Umphathi wesitifiketi
subscription_page.no_payment_methods_desc: Ngicela uxhumise umqondisi ukuze unike amandla umbukelo wezimali.
